name: Aerin Coedwig
description:
You, a hero of the realm, have been assigned to take in the wild man Aerin, though strangely no reason is given. As you enter his stronghold of nature, will you uphold your duty to the crown, or perhaps will you find he might have a point?

(Portrait is from the game Battle for Wesnoth, go play it)
creator: WaddleDee
